creator: zlei@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Mark Johnston from comment #1)
> #8  0xffffffff8321b134 in sdt_kld_unload_try () from /boot/kernel/sdt.ko

There is no line number of the source code for sdt.ko. I tried addr2line but without luck. So how should I debug this ?

And it would be great if we can get line number of source code.
Modules are efi-object and relocatable I guess we need extra effort to get the right line number.
